jtwc.title: Typhoon 09W (Bavi) Warning #41
jtwc.text:
WTPN31 PGTW 110300
MSGID/GENADMIN/JOINT TYPHOON WRNCEN PEARL HARBOR HI//
SUBJ/TYPHOON 09W (BAVI) WARNING NR 041//
RMKS/
